productDisplayName: Puma Unisex Big Cat Navy Blue Backpack
description: Ideal for Sports sessions and for keeping your essentials handy, this puma Big cat backpack is a durable construction packed with storage space. With a zip flap and front organiser space, this bag has room for all your accessories and stationary. With a large main compartment and adjustable shoulder straps, it's an ideal backpack for school, work, travel and fitness.Length: 40 cmWidth: 18 cmDepth: 12 cmMade of 100% nylon for easy cleaning and longer lifeHas branded zippers for durabilityOne zippered compartment on the front with the Jumping Cat branding on the front and three pouches insideLarge main compartment with a padded laptop holder with a Velcro closureTwo adjustable, padded shoulder straps for handling easeAdjustable, padded shoulder strapsPadded baseCareonly hand washClean with a damp cloth when necessaryDo not bleach, tumble dry or wringLine dryDo not iron
